channel.title: Samir Seddiqi
channel.description: Personal site of Samir Seddiqi in Trento. Founder of VitaAvanza, writer of Can You Hear Me?, and builder of calm systems for people and institutions.

item.title: From war to be so far
item.description: A political reflection on distance, responsibility, and the illusion that war ends when it becomes geographically remote.
item.author: ceo@vitaavanza.it (Samir Seddiqi)

item.title: Social inclusion and women’s rights: beyond visibility
item.description: A long-form reflection on inclusion as a structural responsibility, and women’s rights as a measure of societal maturity rather than cultural debate.
item.author: ceo@vitaavanza.it (Samir Seddiqi)
